blocks.text: Spring Classics Roll On: Norwegian Riders Eye E3 Saxo Glory

Monday is a transitional day ahead of a huge Classics week. With E3 Saxo Classic on Friday and Gent-Wevelgem on Sunday, Norwegian cycling fans have plenty to anticipate — Abrahamsen, Hoelgaard, and Wærenskjold are all in the mix on the cobbles.
🎾 ATP Dubrovnik Open continues on clay — no Norwegian stakes, but early rounds set the draw
A quiet Monday on paper — but the calm before the Classics storm. Abrahamsen and Wærenskjold line up at E3 Saxo on Friday. Save your energy.
